{{CargoRelic
|name=Pinocchio
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=12-24
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.2%)
|description=On Dec 24, 1883, famous carpenter Geppetto made puppet Pinocchio. 

Pinocchio is a marionette made by Geppetto. It wears a pointed hat, a jacket, and a pair of knee-length floral pants. When it was finished, the mischievous Pinocchio laughed at Geppetto's face and even took his wig. He wanted to be human so bad and a fairy fulfilled his wish. But she cast a spell on his short nose, saying that the nose grows whenever he lies.
|fame=32
|art=45
|fth=33
|civ=24
|tech=20
|ss1=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +1
|ss2=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +2
|ss3=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss4=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +5
|ss7=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +5<br>Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle: Troop HARD Stats +3 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill I.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, ART Checks -5
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:ART Relics]]
[[Category:Blue ART Relics]]
[[Category:Mutant Minion HARD Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:ART Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Undead Turtle Boost]]
[[Category:Nanosaur Boost]]
[[Category:Berserker Boost]]
